items.title: Sean ‘Diddy’ Combs sells $55 million Miami mansion he tried to use for bail
items.summary: Disgraced music mogul Sean “Diddy” Combs has finally sold the Miami mansion he once put up as collateral in his failed bid for bail in his sex-trafficking case. It was sold for $55 million while he was behind bars.
